requirement_topic.en: BPC Grid Connection — 230 V / 50 Hz and BERA / BPC Coordination
requirement_topic.zh: BPC并网接入——230 V / 50 Hz及BERA / BPC协调
requirement_topic.zht: BPC併網接入——230 V / 50 Hz及BERA / BPC協調

summary.en: Botswana operates on 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz, supplied by the Botswana Power Corporation (BPC). The Botswana Energy Regulatory Authority (BERA) is the statutory electricity regulator responsible for licensing, tariff approval, and grid-connection rules under the Energy Regulation Act. EV charging installations that draw from the BPC grid require a grid-connection agreement and load-addition approval from BPC; commercial and public charging sites additionally require BERA licensing or operator notification depending on installed capacity. Botswana's ambient temperatures regularly reach 35–40 °C outdoors, with dust loadings from Kalahari sand typical for open-air installations; thermal derating and dust ingress protection are practical design requirements. EV charging infrastructure in Botswana is nascent as of 2026; no published BPC-specific EV charging tariff or dedicated EV charging grid code was confirmed from official sources at this date. Power quality and harmonic limits aligned with IEC 61000 series apply under BERA regulatory supervision.
summary.zh: 博茨瓦纳采用230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz电网，由博茨瓦纳电力公司（BPC）供电。博茨瓦纳能源监管局（BERA）是根据《能源监管法》负责许可证、电价审批和并网规则的法定电力监管机构。从BPC电网取电的电动汽车充电安装项目须获得BPC的并网协议和增容审批；商业和公共充电站根据装机容量还须获得BERA许可或向其备案。博茨瓦纳室外环境温度通常高达35—40°C，卡拉哈里沙尘对露天安装普遍存在；热降额和防尘入侵保护是实际设计要求。截至2026年，博茨瓦纳电动汽车充电基础设施尚处于起步阶段；截至本日期，未能从官方来源确认BPC已发布专项电动汽车充电电价或专用电动汽车充电并网规则。电能质量和谐波限值依据IEC 61000系列标准在BERA监管下执行。
summary.zht: 波札那採用230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz電網，由波札那電力公司（BPC）供電。波札那能源監管局（BERA）是根據《能源監管法》負責許可證、電價審批和併網規則的法定電力監管機構。從BPC電網取電的電動汽車充電安裝項目須獲得BPC的併網協議和增容審批；商業和公共充電站根據裝機容量還須獲得BERA許可或向其備案。波札那室外環境溫度通常高達35—40°C，卡拉哈里沙塵對露天安裝普遍存在；熱降額和防塵侵入保護是實際設計要求。截至2026年，波札那電動汽車充電基礎設施尚處於起步階段；截至本日期，未能從官方來源確認BPC已發布專項電動汽車充電電價或專用電動汽車充電併網規則。電能質量和諧波限值依據IEC 61000系列標準在BERA監管下執行。

standards_or_laws: Energy Regulation Act — Botswana (BERA licensing and grid-connection authority)
BPC grid-connection and load-addition application requirements
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are accepted under GB/T 18487.1-2023 design evidence, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC systems, and local grid-operator project acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. Botswana's 230 V / 400 V supply is close to China's domestic voltage but not identical; input-voltage range, protection ratings, and thermal derating for Botswana ambient temperatures (regularly 35–40 °C, peak above 40 °C) must be confirmed. China domestic climate assumptions (cooler northern regions) do not cover Botswana's sustained high-ambient and high-dust environment.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装依据GB/T 18487.1-2023设计证据、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930-2023通信，以及当地电网运营商项目验收。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。博茨瓦纳230 V / 400 V供电与中国国内电压接近但并不完全相同；须确认输入电压范围、保护额定值，以及适配博茨瓦纳环境温度（通常35—40°C，峰值超40°C）的热降额。中国国内气候假设（较凉爽的北方地区）不涵盖博茨瓦纳持续高温高尘环境。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝依據GB/T 18487.1-2023設計證據、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930-2023通訊，以及當地電網運營商項目驗收。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。波札那230 V / 400 V供電與中國國內電壓接近但並不完全相同；須確認輸入電壓範圍、保護額定值，以及適配波札那環境溫度（通常35—40°C，峰值超40°C）的熱降額。中國國內氣候假設（較涼爽的北方地區）不涵蓋波札那持續高溫高塵環境。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) input-voltage range and rated voltage of the charger covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz; (2) power electronics and thermal design are derated for Botswana ambient temperatures (35–40 °C typical, above 40 °C peak) and Kalahari dust; (3) a grid-connection and load-addition agreement is obtained from BPC before installation; (4) BERA licensing or notification is completed as required for the installation type and capacity; (5) harmonic and power-quality data are prepared for BPC or BERA review. No BPC-dedicated EV charging technical specification was confirmed at time of writing; exporters should check with BPC and BERA directly for current grid-connection requirements.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩输入电压范围和额定电压覆盖230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz；(2) 电力电子和热设计针对博茨瓦纳环境温度（通常35—40°C，峰值超40°C）及卡拉哈里沙尘进行了降额；(3) 安装前已获得BPC的并网和增容协议；(4) 已根据安装类型和容量完成BERA许可或备案；(5) 已为BPC或BERA审查准备谐波和电能质量数据。撰写时未能确认BPC是否已发布专项电动汽车充电技术规范；出口商应直接向BPC和BERA核实当前并网要求。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁輸入電壓範圍和額定電壓覆蓋230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz；(2) 電力電子和熱設計針對波札那環境溫度（通常35—40°C，峰值超40°C）及卡拉哈里沙塵進行了降額；(3) 安裝前已獲得BPC的併網和增容協議；(4) 已根據安裝類型和容量完成BERA許可或備案；(5) 已為BPC或BERA審查準備諧波和電能質量數據。撰寫時未能確認BPC是否已發布專項電動汽車充電技術規範；出口商應直接向BPC和BERA核實當前併網要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — BPC grid-connection agreement and load-addition approval required for all grid-connected charger installations; BERA licensing or notification required depending on capacity; no dedicated EV charging grid code confirmed at time of writing — verify with BPC and BERA directly
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a BPC or BERA approval substitute; voltage and thermal ratings must be re-confirmed for Botswana conditions

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Botswana-ready charger package needs BPC grid-connection approval, BERA licensing or notification, and thermal / dust derating evidence for Botswana's climate. China domestic 220 V / 380 V design documentation does not substitute for BPC or BERA approval; voltage and thermal conditions must be individually confirmed.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向博茨瓦纳的充电桩资料包须包括BPC并网审批、BERA许可或备案，以及适配博茨瓦纳气候的热降额/防尘证据。中国国内220 V / 380 V设计文件不能替代BPC或BERA审批；电压和热环境条件须逐项确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向波札那的充電樁資料包須包括BPC併網審批、BERA許可或備案，以及適配波札那氣候的熱降額/防塵證據。中國國內220 V / 380 V設計文件不能替代BPC或BERA審批；電壓和熱環境條件須逐項確認。
